Okay, welcome back to module four. This is going to be our second official writing workshop and we're going to use this module to really give you perspective on that chasm, that gap. What's happening in between? Why have they been unable to cross it and what dangers, pitfalls, misfires, false beliefs or bad moves have really kept them stuck on one side. This is going to be where you stand and really observe what's in that gap. You're the scout leader, you're the expert of this territory or the park ranger if we want to continue on that analogy and you're really going to share that insider perspective and knowledge to both give clarity as to why they haven't been able to cross it before as well as what new belief systems, structures or supports are needed to successfully bridge it. So with that said, this is what we're going to be looking at on our 15 point sales page in a day theme plate, section six, seven, eight and nine. We're going to slaughter some sacred cows and install some new beliefs to replace them. We're going to create the blue ocean bridge, which is really your transition into the solution. We're going to solidify those beliefs using your bio and then we're going to continue to solidify them with testimonials. So like last time, just make sure that you have all your raw materials handy, your 67 questions workbook, your five advanced empathy exercises, the enrollment extractor workbook if you've been using that as well as the launch Bible. So get those handy, get them all in order and I'll see you in the next lesson where we slaughter some sacred cows. I'll see you there.
